mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.book_id, b.title AS book_title, p.quantity, p.unit_price, p.total_amount, p.purchase_date FROM purchases p, books b WHERE p.book_id = b.id ORDER BY p.purchase_date DESC
SELECT p.id, p.book_id, b.title AS book_title, p.quantity, p.unit_price, p.total_amount, p.purchase_date FROM purchases p, books b WHERE p.book_id = b.id AND p.id = #{id}

SELECT p.id, p.book_id, b.title AS book_title, p.quantity, p.unit_price, p.total_amount, p.purchase_date FROM purchases p, books b WHERE p.book_id = b.id AND p.book_id = #{bookId} ORDER BY p.purchase_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO purchases (book_id, quantity, unit_price, total_amount, purchase_date) VALUES (#{bookId}, #{quantity}, #{unitPrice}, #{totalAmount}, #{purchaseDate})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM purchases WHERE book_id = #{bookId}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM purchases WHERE purchase_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
